zh.lifeSummary: 當Heilin ap Tudor於1230年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN52歲，母親Adelicia or Eva verch Richard133歲。他於1281年與Agnes verch Belddyn在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年在威爾士丹比爾利朗哈法爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heilin ap Tudor于1230年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN52岁，母亲Adelicia or Eva verch Richard133岁。他于1281年与Agnes verch Belddyn在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1282年在威尔士丹比爾利朗哈法爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Tudor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Tudur, a derivative of British Celtic Toutorīx, literally ‘people’ + ‘king’. It has sometimes been taken as a Welsh equivalent of Latin Theodorus, from Greek Theodōros ‘gift of God’ (see Theodore ), for which the usual Welsh form is Tewdwr.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Tudor, a variant of Teodor (see Theodore ).

History: The Tudor royal family, English sovereigns from the accession of Henry VII in 1485 to the death of Elizabeth I in 1603, were of Welsh origin, being descended from Owain ap Maredudd ap Tudur, who held lands at Penmynydd in Anglesey.

variants.name: Theodore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Serge, Henri, Pierre, Alide, Andre, Antoine, Benoit, Berthony, Chantal, Daphnee, Edouard, Guilene.

French and Mauritian (Théodore); West Indian (in Haiti, Martinique, and Guadeloupe Théodore); English and Welsh: from a personal name derived from Greek Theodōros, a compound of theos ‘God’ + dōron ‘gift’, which was relatively popular in the Middle Ages because of its auspicious meaning. The name was borne by several early Christian saints. There was considerable confusion with the ancient Germanic name Theodoric (see Terry ). In Wales, the personal name Theodore was also adopted as an approximation to the Welsh name Tewdwr (see Tudor ). In North America, this surname has absorbed various other European cognates and their derivatives, e.g. Greek Theodorakis , Macedonian Todorovski, and Serbian Todorović (see Todorovic ).

variants.name: Tedder
meanings: English (Surrey): from the Middle English personal name Thedere, Teddere, which is either from the Old English personal name Thēodhere (from thēod ‘people’ + here ‘army’) or from the cognate ancient Germanic personal name Theudher, which seems to have been adopted by the Normans. Alternatively, perhaps it may be an occupational name from Middle English teddere ‘one who teds’, i.e. a person whose occupation was to spread mown grass for drying.

nameMeanings.name: Heilin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Heilin ap Tudor was born in 1230, in Wales, his father, Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN, was 52 and his mother, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, was 133. He married Agnes verch Belddyn in 1281, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1282, in Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heilin ap Tudor est né en 1230, à Galles, son père, Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, avait 133 ans. Il a épousé Agnes verch Belddyn en 1281, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1282, à Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heilin ap Tudor 1230 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN 52 und seine Mutter Adelicia or Eva verch Richard 133. Er hat 1281 in Wales Agnes verch Belddyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1282 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heilin ap Tudor è nato il nel 1230 nel Galles, il suo padre, Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, aveva 133 anni. Lui sposato Agnes verch Belddyn nel 1281, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1282, nel Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heilin ap Tudorが1230年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHANは52歳，母Adelicia or Eva verch Richardは133歳であった。1281年にウェールズでAgnes verch Belddynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1282年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアラングインハファルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heilin ap Tudor(이)가 1230년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelicia or Eva verch Richard(은)는 133세였다. 그는 1281년 웨일스에서 Agnes verch Belddyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭이하팔에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heilin ap Tudor nasceu em 1230, em Gales, seu pai, Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, tinha 133 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes verch Belddyn em 1281, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1282, em Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Gales, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heilin ap Tudor родился в 1230 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, 133. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes verch Belddyn в 1281 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1282 г. в местности ллангинафаль, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heilin ap Tudor nació en 1230, en Gales, su papá, Sir Tudur ap Ednyfed FYCHAN, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, tenía 133 años. Se casó con Agnes verch Belddyn en 1281, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1282, en Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 52 años.
